description_long: This figure represents an adult pedestrian dressed in a traditional, flowing robe with wide sleeves and ornate shoulder decorations. The garment is floor-length and features layered fabric, with a sash and decorative floral elements at the waist. The individual has a pale complexion and a serene facial expression, with hands relaxed at their sides. The head is adorned with an elaborate headdress, adding to the formal and ceremonial appearance. The shoes are simple and flat, matching the overall elegant and historical style. The overall look suggests a character inspired by East Asian historical or fantasy attire, suitable for a themed urban or cultural setting.
description: An adult in a traditional, ornate robe with wide sleeves, floral waist decoration, and an elaborate headdress, exuding a formal and ceremonial presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full robe, floral waist decoration, wide sleeves, and the detailed headdress.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered sleeve structure, the profile of the headdress, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the robe, the long sash, and the symmetrical design of the headdress and shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sleeve layers, robe drape, and headdress profile.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional long robe with wide sleeves, layered fabric, sash, and ornate headdress
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in an elaborate updo
